taglines.internalHero: The operating system for your ecosystem.
taglines.internalSub: Verified actions. Proof-backed results. Autonomous reliability.

empty.allGreen: All core checks are green. No action required.

stateNotes.caution: Some checks are degraded. Autonomy is operating in safe mode.
stateNotes.readOnly: Production is locked to read-only to prevent unsafe changes. Review incidents and unlock with approval.

reasoningCard.title: Plan & Proof

values.planLine: I will run {stepCount} steps with verification.

tierTooltips.t0: Read-only checks. Always safe to run.
tierTooltips.t2: High impact. Requires approval in production.

reasoningCard.approvalNotice: Some steps require approval. I'll prepare an approval card instead of executing.

behavior.vagueInputHint: Ask me to deploy, investigate an issue, or check system health.

page.title: Autonomy Control
page.subtitle: Autonomy runs missions to keep systems healthy, verified, and auditable.

caution.title: Caution
caution.body: Autonomy is limited to safe operations until stability improves.

readOnly.title: Read-only
readOnly.body: Production changes are blocked. Approvals required to unlock.

controls.runTickTooltip: Runs all due missions within blast radius limits.
controls.unlockProdTooltip: Creates an approval request to unlock production.

page.title: Releases
page.subtitle: Proof-backed deployment ledger with stage timings and reports.

detail.summaryCopy: This release is backed by structured proofs and timed stages.
detail.runIdCopy: Run ID ties all artifacts together.
detail.stagesCopy: Stages are executed with strict timeouts and exit normalization.
detail.stagesFailCopy: Any failed stage requires investigation before proceeding.

empty.none: No releases found for this environment.

page.title: Ops Incidents
page.subtitle: Deduped, evidence-backed incidents with runbooks and proofs.

steps.s1: Check current state: Health, Drift, Releases
steps.s3: If production is read-only, request unlock approval

empty.noneOpen: No open incidents. Systems are stable.

page.title: Approvals
page.subtitle: High-impact actions require explicit approval in production.

approvals.executingHint: This request is currently executing. Actions are temporarily disabled.

alwaysHelp.line1: Approves this action in the same environment under the same scope.
alwaysHelp.line2: You can revoke always-approvals at any time.

warnings.prod: This action changes production. Proofs are required after execution.

page.title: Brands
page.subtitle: Your ecosystem brands and client brands — assets, domains, socials, and launch kits in one place.

identity.name: Brand Name
identity.helper: Internal brands power the Migra ecosystem. Client brands are isolated and tenant-scoped.

assets.logoHelper: Upload primary logo, icon mark, and monochrome variants.
assets.colorHelper: Define primary, secondary, neutrals, and accent colors.
assets.typographyHelper: Set font stack for headings and body.

domains.helper: Domains are verified daily for DNS resolution and TLS health.

socials.helper: Store profile links and verify they remain reachable.

templates.helper: Generate banners and post templates from brand assets.

launchKit.helper: A ready-to-share press kit: logos, colors, boilerplate, and links.

tooltips.proof: Evidence captured for audit and verification.
tooltips.runId: Unique ID tying logs, reports, and activity together.
tooltips.dedupe: Prevents repeated incidents for the same issue.

toasts.degradedSafeMode: Degraded. Autonomy limited to safe mode.
toasts.failedEvidenceIncident: Failed. Evidence recorded and incident created.

security.opsRoutesProtected: Ops routes are protected. Machine access requires OPS_API_TOKEN.
